case_title: THE CITY TOW VS CASTILLO, SHIRLEY

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-23-1998, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, SHIRLEY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
